name: Vaqueritos Virtual
notes:
Somos un grupo de A.A. que encontramos en las reuniones virtuales permanecer sobrios y unidos.
Grupo de habla hispana que compartimos nuestra experiencia, fortaleza y esperanza.
 
Reuniones de Lunes a domingo 8am y 8pm Tiempo del centro de México.
Reuniones de  8am a 9:30am y 8pm a 9:30pm los 7 días de la semana 
Agenda:
 
8am a 9:30am
lunes: Plenitud Digital 
martes: Texto Básico
miércoles: Lenguaje del corazón
jueves: Capacitación de Información al Publico
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: Lo mejor de Bill
 
8pm a 9:30pm
lunes: Plenitud Digital
martes:12 Doce pasos 
miércoles: Llegamos a creer 
Jueves: Texto Básico 
Viernes: Viviendo Sobrio
Sábado: 12 Tradiciones 
Domingo: 12 conceptos para el servicio mundial

name: AA A New Beginning
notes:
We are an online community dedicated to recovery from alcoholism using the program of Alcoholics Anonymous. We believe in upholding the traditions of AA, and strive to help those who still suffer.
We have open chat, as well as open meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous and email meetings. Chat meetings take place at 9:00 PM EST.
Our primary purpose is to stay sober and help others to recover from alcoholism.

name: Sunday's Best
notes: A meeting to help recover from alcohol - 1pm every Sunday. We open at 12:45pm

name: Life After 10 Tuesdays
notes:
Life After 10 meets every Tuesday at 6pm via Zoom. Before the stay at home mandate we met at Olive Lutheran Church, Ocean Park Blvd in Santa Monica
Format of the meeting is for the Speaker to read a paragraph in the Big Book of Alcoholics Anonymous and share for 15 minutes on what they read. Participants with 10 or more years can share for 3 minutes.. Birthday participants of any sobriety length can share for 3 minutes.
Deaf/Hard of Hearing Interpreter. This is a closed meeting to alcoholics, Men, Women, & Non-Binary.   Meeting ends with 3 minutes of meditation.

name: Wednesday Night Candlelight
notes:
A Wednesday night participation meeting at 8:30pm PST. This is an open meeting that is based on a step of the week. The format is we have a leader that shares for 10 minutes on the step and he/she then picks members to share for three minutes, sharing continues for the remainder of the meeting. The meeting is 1 hour long, every Wednesday 8:30pm PST.

https://us02web.zoom.us/j/726415314

 
Email: candlelightaajp@gmail.com

Public Phone Number, if any: +16699009128,,726415314# US (San Jose)
Meeting Access Code, if any: 726415314
